title: Generating and filing a VAT return

captions.text: From VAT Returns, create a new return for the period.
Comply calculates the return from your recorded transactions.
Before filing: review the figures and acknowledge the penalty exposure.
Validation warnings are shown plainly and must be acknowledged, never hidden.
Continue to Filing generates the artifacts. You lodge with the DIR yourself.
Back in the list, record the DIR acknowledgement to mark the return lodged.
Credit and zero returns advance to Lodged and Paid with no payment to record.
